summary: Educational app/site with pages on renewable energy topics; update content readability and add diagrams/images to match other pages.

existing_features.title: Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Hydropower & Tidal page (frontend/src/pages/HydropowerTidalPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Wind Energy page (frontend/src/pages/WindEnergyPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Geothermal Energy page (frontend/src/pages/GeothermalEnergyPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Biomass Energy page (frontend/src/pages/BiomassEnergyPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Biofuels page (frontend/src/pages/BiofuelsPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.
Add a new Biofuels process diagram component (similar in style and structure to the existing SVG diagram components) and render it at the bottom of the Biofuels page content.
Simplify user-facing paragraph text on the Sources page (frontend/src/pages/SourcesPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level without changing any source titles or URLs.

new_feature_requests.summary: Simplify/rewriting page paragraphs (Hydropower & Tidal, Wind Energy, Geothermal, Biomass, Biofuels, Sources) to a lower high school reading level.
Add a biofuels process diagram image at the bottom of the Biofuels page, consistent with diagrams used on the other pages.
